issues_found: Source is a navigation/container page providing links to FOMC documents, not the actual content itself
URL points to press conference page but source body only contains navigation links and accessibility instructions
Generated record has empty summary, key_points, why_it_matters, macro_context, and all other substantive fields
source.name is incorrectly set to 'macro catalysts' instead of the actual source 'Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System'
published_at is empty despite metadata indicating release date of January 28, 2026
No actual FOMC statement, rate decision, or substantive content is present in the source
Container pages are explicitly excluded from acceptance per RULE 5
